_comment: Example config for cmd/description-fetcher. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

nats._comment: The fetcher consumes jobs.description.fetch.requested and publishes jobs.description.fetched into this stream.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file where jobs and fetched descriptions are stored.

consumer._comment: Durable pull consumer settings for jobs.description.fetch.requested.

http_client._comment: HTTP settings for retrieving job posting pages. store_raw_html=false persists only extracted text.
